title: DESIGN.
ENGINEERING.
OUTCOMES.
hero.intro: We build what works and ship it. The rest is theater.

sections.title: PRODUCTS, NOT PORTFOLIOS.
sections.body: Strategy, design, engineering, and launch — in one tight loop. No hand-offs between agencies. No account managers. You deal directly with the people building it.

cards.title: PRODUCT
cards.description: We define what to build and why. Not what's impressive — what's fundable, saleable, or livable.

cards.title: DESIGN
cards.description: Clear, fast, usable. Whatever makes the user do the thing, nothing extra.

cards.title: ENGINEERING
cards.description: Ship something that runs. Not something that works in the demo.

cards.title: LAUNCH
cards.description: We go live and measure. First revenue, not first impressions.
